title: EQT, Partners Group & ITC Info eye a chunk of Ashok Soota’s Happiest Minds
description: Private equity firms EQT and Partners Group, along with ITC Infotech, are exploring a controlling stake in Happiest Minds from founder Ashok Soota, who holds 44%. At a post-earnings press conference in February, when asked about stake sale plans, Soota said that the company was focused on its artificial intelligence project and that he remained “very much at the helm."

title: Report: Anthropic's Clark Briefs Lawmakers Amid Suit
description: A bipartisan briefing on artificial intelligence security issues, including how advanced systems can be copied and how sensitive technology is shared across borders, took place Wednesday when Anthropic co-founder Jack Clark met privately with members of the House Homeland Security Committee.
